signal.qualitative_note: AI optionality premium 14.6% — AI investment appears proportionate to core business value.

bear.narrative: Reality Labs cash drain intensifies; regulatory antitrust action (EU structural remedy or US Instagram/WhatsApp dissolution) forces business separation; AI ad-targeting fails to improve ROAS meaningfully in a macro downturn — Family of Apps revenue decelerates sharply while elevated capex continues

base.narrative: Family of Apps sustains mid-teens revenue growth on AI-targeting ROAS gains and Threads monetisation; Reality Labs losses stabilise below $20B/year as smart-glasses hardware gains commercial traction; regulatory fines (DMA, GDPR) remain manageable without structural remedy

bull.narrative: AI-driven ad-targeting unlocks a step-change in advertiser ROAS, re-accelerating revenue growth above consensus; Reality Labs smart-glasses pivot toward profitable hardware and enterprise AR; EU/US regulatory outcomes resolved without structural separation — regulatory overhang re-rated as a non-event

sensitivity.note: WACC dominates — ±100 bps WACC moves base IV by ±17.1%

position_sizing.rationale: WATCH × WITHIN BEAR-BASE (price $611.21 vs base IV $810.76, MoS +32.6%) → 2–3% band (HIGH confidence anchor from playbook, no cap applied).

failure_modes: DAP (Daily Active People) growth decelerates below 3% YoY — engagement floor premise breaks, monetisation leverage disappears
EU antitrust forced structural separation of Messenger, WhatsApp, or Instagram from the core Facebook platform
US DOJ action seeking dissolution of the Instagram and/or WhatsApp acquisitions
Reality Labs capex sustainably above $20B/year without a credible near-term monetisation path — free cash flow drag becomes consensus-thesis-breaking
AI-generated content floods the feed and degrades ad-targeting signal quality — privacy-sandbox-style ROAS deterioration without a regulatory catalyst
Threads fails to retain users at scale; no advertising revenue materialises by 2027 — eliminates the third-pillar optionality embedded in the base case
